heading: Hawliad {{claimantName, pluralPossessive}}
secondaryHeading: Ymateb i hawliad i feddiannu eiddo
paragraph1: cyYou will now be asked to respond to specific parts of {{claimantName, pluralPossessive}} claim.
paragraph2: cyWhen they made their claim, they had to give information about:
listItem1: cythe tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement you signed to rent your property
listItem2: yr hysbysiad o'u bwriad i ddechrau achos meddiannu, os gwnaethant gyflwyno un i chi
listItem3: eu seiliau dros feddiannu (eu rhesymau dros wneud yr hawliad)
paragraph3: cyIf any of the information they’ve given is not correct, you can correct it.
paragraph4: cyYou will also be asked if you want to make a counterclaim against {{claimantName}}. If you do, you will need to explain what your counterclaim is and why you’re making it. You will also need to pay a fee.
paragraph5: Bydd yr hawlydd yn gallu gweld eich atebion.
